name: American Trading Company
description_short: Cincinnati-based buyer and pawn shop specializing in gold, jewelry, rare coins, and firearms with 50+ years of experience across two locations.
description_long:
American Trading Company is an established precious metals and collectibles dealer operating in the Cincinnati area for over 50 years. The company operates two physical locations (3209 W. Galbraith Road and 3621 Harrison Avenue) and focuses on buying, selling, trading, and pawning high-value items including scrap gold, jewelry, rare coins, diamonds, watches, and firearms. Their longevity in the industry suggests operational stability and accumulated expertise in valuation across multiple asset categories.

The company offers a range of services centered on converting valuables to cash. They purchase scrap gold, old jewelry, diamonds, rare coins (U.S., foreign, and ancient), Rolex watches, and firearms/ammunition. They also operate as a pawn shop providing cash loans against collateral. Additionally, they sell items at wholesale prices—gold, silver, platinum jewelry, bullion, rare coins, and firearms—and have partnered with Davidson's to facilitate gun purchases for in-store pickup. Free verbal quotes are available in-person at either location.

American Trading Company differentiates itself through its 50+ year operational history, multi-category expertise (jewelry, coins, firearms, bullion), and willingness to evaluate items customers may believe worthless. They emphasize competitive cash payouts and wholesale pricing for buyers. The addition of pawn services (advertised as "Quick Cash!") broadens their appeal beyond simple buy-sell transactions. Their partnership with Davidson's for firearm fulfillment suggests operational scale and supplier relationships.

The company operates as a traditional pawn and precious metals dealer with standard industry limitations. No information is available regarding licensing details, interest rates on pawn loans, grading standards for coins/jewelry, or customer dispute resolution processes. Their services are location-dependent (two Cincinnati addresses only), and the website lacks transparency on valuation methodology or fee structures. This is appropriate for consumers with physical valuables seeking immediate cash but unsuitable for those needing credit products, financial counseling, or remote transactions.
pros: 50+ years of operational history in Cincinnati market, suggesting stability and expertise
Multiple asset categories handled (jewelry, coins, firearms, bullion, watches) reduces need to visit multiple dealers
Offers both buying/selling and pawn loan options for flexible cash access
Free in-person verbal quotes with no obligation
Wholesale pricing available for buyers seeking bulk or discounted precious metals
Partnership with Davidson's enables gun purchases with local pickup convenience
Two location options (W. Galbraith Road and Harrison Avenue) for accessibility
cons: Services limited to two physical Cincinnati locations only—no remote appraisal or mail-in options
Website lacks transparent information on pawn loan terms, interest rates, or repayment periods
No details provided on grading standards, valuation methodology, or how competitive prices are determined
No visible customer reviews, ratings, or third-party verification of fair dealing practices
Firearms sales tied to partner (Davidson's)—unclear if all firearm categories available or if additional fees apply
best_for: Cincinnati residents with physical gold, jewelry, or watches needing immediate cash
Collectors of rare coins or numismatic items seeking expert evaluation and sale
Gun owners or enthusiasts looking to buy, sell, or trade firearms locally
diagnosis: American Trading Company is best for Cincinnati-area residents holding physical valuables (precious metals, jewelry, coins, firearms) who need to convert them to cash quickly. The main caveats are geographic limitation to two Cincinnati locations, lack of transparent pricing/loan term information, and absence of online transactions—customers must visit in-person for quotes and service.
services: Purchase of scrap gold and old jewelry
Purchase of rare coins (U.S., foreign, and ancient)
Purchase of diamonds and diamond jewelry
Purchase and sale of firearms and ammunition
Pawn loans against collateral for quick cash
Sale of precious metals (gold, silver, platinum) at wholesale prices
Sale of rare coins and currency
Gun purchasing facilitation through Davidson's partnership with in-store pickup
Buy, sell, and trade services across all categories
